nasb.text: Laban said to Jacob, “Behold this heap and behold the pillar which I have set between you and me.

esv.text: Then Laban said to Jacob, “See this heap and the pillar, which I have set between you and me.

cnv.text: 拉班又對雅各說：“你看這堆石頭，看我在你我之間所豎立的石柱。

ccb.text: 拉班又说：“看我在你我之间立的这石堆和石柱。

csbs.text: 拉班对雅各说：“看哪，这石堆！看哪，这柱子！是我在你我之间放置的；
